items.title: Speech Package
items.description: Timing-safe speech materials: 2-min video script, 2-3 min ISEF-style judge script, 20-sec abstract-mismatch answer, and quick-reference card.

items.title: Presenter Guide (Presenter Mode)
items.description: Presenter-mode demo script + control-by-control explanation.

items.title: Methods & Rigor — Presenter Mode (User Guide)
items.description: Annotated guide to the Methods & Rigor screen: Limitations & Scientific Wording, Leakage Guardrails, Data Sources (Paired vs Unpaired), and MiMeDB Evidence. Includes screenshots and presenter-safe wording.

items.title: Presentation Addendum
items.description: Companion to the approved abstract; limitations, lessons learned, and dataset-reality roadmap. Does not modify the approved abstract.

items.title: Implementation Plan
items.description: Lovable implementation plan used as build roadmap (Phase 1–3).

items.title: External Datasets Overview
items.description: Reference datasets, bundling details, data build notes, and licensing for all external sources used in CogniBiome.

items.title: References & Licenses
items.description: Licenses and attribution notes for reference snapshots.

items.title: User Guide
items.description: Judge walkthrough + full UI reference.

items.title: User Guide (Generated by Cursor)
items.description: AI-generated visual user guide with per-section screenshots: Dashboard, Pilot Results, Simulator, Methods, Compare, Export, Help.
